title: Department Manager Vacancy at Tanishq Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Tanishq Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tanishq Global Group! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tanishq Global Group:
Tanishq Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq Global Group!
